title: Toy dataset for mixed-tailing analysis using nanopore direct RNA sequencing (RNA004)
author: Chang, Hyeshik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This toy dataset contains a subset of direct RNA sequencing data from  Jung et al. (2025) . It has been anonymized and reorganized specifically for the AI co-scientist competition. 
 The full original dataset is available from K-BDS (https://kbds.re.kr/KAP241592).
steps_raw:
